﻿.. _dp-MediaSLOT2_ContentsInfoListRegenerateUpdateTime:

CrDeviceProperty_MediaSLOT2_ContentsInfoListRegenerateUpdateTime
================================================================

Get the media slot 2 ContentsInfoList regenerate update time.

    CrDataType: `CrDataType_UInt64Range`

.. list-table::
  :widths: auto
  :header-rows: 1

  * - Value
    - Explanation

  * - variable
    - UnixTime(ms) UTC

| ContentsInfoList is regenerated when any contents is edited or deleted on media.
